absorption: Significant BID absorption observed at the session VAL (60562.5), indicated by positive delta (+30) and buying on the footprint despite the price being at a key low.
dom_observation: Strong stacked bids are visible below the current price (e.g., 80 lots at 60460), providing support, while sellers are defending higher levels (e.g., 63 lots at 60680).
reasoning: Fiyat, seansin kilit destek seviyesi olan VAL'de alici absorpsiyonu ile guclu bir reddedilme (rejection) gosteriyor, bu durum pozitif delta ve DOM'daki alim emirleri ile teyit ediliyor.
